description: Get an analysis's parameter schema — ALWAYS call before run_analysis.

description.name: run_analysis
description.description: Run an analysis on your data. Returns a shareable interactive report URL — validated statistics you can cite, re-run, and share.

description.name: create_analysis
description.description: Commission a NEW analysis built for your question. tier is REQUIRED — the user picks. Easiest: fuzzy_request (plain language) + dataset_ref + tier. Snapshot = instant automated report (~2-10 min). JSON = a fast computed answer, numbers + method, re-runnable tool you own (~5 min). Brief = the compute

description.name: modify_analysis
description.description: Modify an EXISTING analysis into a new version — reword the question, swap the method, or add a variable. Pass tool_name + changes (plain language). Rebuilds on the analysis's own dataset by default; the original stays put. Returns pipeline tracking — follow with build_status.

description.name: build_status
description.description: Check a commissioned build in-chat: stage progress, queue position, rejection reason if the data didn't match the objective, honest ETA, report link when delivered.

description.name: reports_list
description.description: Your report library — every analysis delivered, with status and links.

description.name: reports_view
description.description: Get a shareable browser link for a report — viewable without authentication.

description.name: report_cards
description.description: Browse a delivered report's individual cards (charts, tables, insights) inline in chat.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "api-key" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: build_status, report_cards · Private data: datasets_upload, discover_tools · Public sink: account_link, datasets_upload, run_analysis · Destructive: run_analysis, modify_analysis.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: build_status, report_cards · Private data: datasets_upload, discover_tools · Public sink: account_link, datasets_upload, run_analysis · Destructive: run_analysis, modify_analysis

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
